title: Phase 3B Observation-Based Spatial Validation Using Public Mindoro Spill Extents
subtitle: Mindoro March 13 -> March 14 public spill-extent reinitialization validation
shared_imagery_caveat: Both NOAA/NESDIS public products cite WorldView-3 imagery acquired on 2023-03-12, so the promoted March 13 -> March 14 row is a reinitialization-based public-validation pair with shared-imagery provenance rather than a fully independent day-to-day validation.

dual_provenance_confirmation.confirmation_interpretation: The separate phase1_mindoro_focus_pre_spill_2016_2023 Mindoro-focused drifter rerun selected cmems_gfs as the active official B1 recipe after the focused four-recipe comparison. It now serves as the active Mindoro-specific recipe-provenance lane for B1 without rewriting the original March 13 -> March 14 raw-generation history.
dual_provenance_confirmation.thesis_phase_title: Phase 3B Observation-Based Spatial Validation Using Public Mindoro Spill Extents
dual_provenance_confirmation.thesis_phase_subtitle: Mindoro March 13 -> March 14 public spill-extent reinitialization validation

exported_files.provenance_note: Display-only publication rendering derived from stored March 13/14 observation geometry; no scientific rerun and no direct drifter ingestion inside Phase 3B.
exported_files.status_label: Mindoro March 13 -> March 14 R1 primary validation row
exported_files.status_provenance: March 13 seed, March 14 target, explicit shared March 12 imagery caveat, active Mindoro-specific recipe provenance from the separate focused 2016-2023 drifter rerun, and the preserved raw scientific note that the stored promoted B1 run remains tied to the existing R1_previous reinit lineage. This March 13 -> March 14 R1 label refers to the Phase 3B validation branch, not to the Phase 1 recipe-code family.
exported_files.status_panel_text: Main Mindoro B1 Phase 3B observation-based spatial validation view. This page will use the March 13 -> March 14 R1 primary validation row only. Phase 3B itself does not directly ingest drifters; it inherits the official cmems_gfs B1 recipe from the separate focused 2016-2023 Mindoro drifter rerun after that four-recipe rerun found cmems_gfs as the historical winner and promoted it directly into official B1, while the broader 2016-2022 regional rerun stays reference-only. The stored promoted B1 run remains tied to the existing R1_previous reinit lineage. Keep the shared March 12 imagery caveat explicit.
exported_files.status_dashboard_summary: March 13 -> March 14 R1 primary validation row only; the focused 2016-2023 Mindoro drifter rerun found cmems_gfs as the historical winner, official B1 now uses cmems_gfs, and the stored promoted run remains tied to the existing R1_previous reinit lineage.
exported_files.surface_description: Eligible for thesis-facing home and main presentation surfaces.

Phase 3B itself does not directly ingest drifters; it inherits the official cmems_gfs B1 recipe from the separate focused 2016-2023 Mindoro drifter rerun after that four-recipe rerun found cmems_gfs as the historical winner and promoted it directly into official B1, while the broader 2016-2022 regional rerun stays reference-only. The stored promoted B1 run remains tied to the existing R1_previous reinit lineage. Keep the shared March 12 imagery caveat explicit.
exported_files.status_dashboard_summary: March 13 -> March 14 R1 primary validation row only; the focused 2016-2023 Mindoro drifter rerun found cmems_gfs as the historical winner, official B1 now uses cmems_gfs, and the stored promoted run remains tied to the existing R1_previous reinit lineage.
exported_files.surface_description: Eligible for thesis-facing home and main presentation surfaces.
